description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The back panel is a deep, metallic purple and features a prominent silver Apple logo centered near the upper half. The upper left corner of the back houses a raised, square camera module containing three large camera lenses and a flash, arranged in a triangular pattern. The front of the device is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels and a pill-shaped cutout at the top for the front-facing camera and sensors. The sides are flat and metallic, with subtle seams for buttons and antenna lines, and the overall build appears premium and solid. The device is thin, with a slight protrusion for the rear camera module, and no external case or cover is present.
description: A sleek, metallic purple smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, triple rear cameras, and a centered Apple logo on the back.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the metallic purple back, centered silver Apple logo, and a raised triple camera module in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the device's thinness and the protrusion of the rear camera module.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large, edge-to-edge screen with a pill-shaped cutout at the top for the front camera and sensors.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the slim profile and the camera bump, with no visible buttons or ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back panel, visually distinct against the purple surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a gradient wallpaper with purple and black circular shapes, and a pill-shaped cutout at the top for the front camera and sensors. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Three camera lenses and a flash are arranged in a triangular pattern within a raised square module at the top left corner of the back panel.
attribute_button_layout: No physical buttons are visible in the provided views, but typical placements would be along the sides.
